User.title: User
User.description: A user of the EKSATHE platform.

id.description: The unique ID of the user.

name.description: The full name of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

avatar.description: The URL of the user's avatar image.

Plan.title: Plan
Plan.description: A community plan or activity shared by a user.

id.description: The unique ID of the plan.

userId.description: The ID of the user who created the plan.

userName.description: The name of the user who created the plan.

description.description: A detailed description of the plan.

location.description: The location where the activity will take place.

dateTime.description: The scheduled date and time of the plan.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the plan was created.

tags.description: Categorical tags (e.g., Sports, Travel, Foodie) for the plan.

likes.description: Array of user IDs who liked the plan.
